causing loss of courage and wisdom; 1 Bindu evils of all kinds and absence of Bindus will
bring about death.
7.EFFECTS OF JUPITERS A.V.
Based on the number of auspicious points, the Sign occupied by Jupiter will produce the following
effects: 8 Bindus spotless fame, happiness and growth of wealth; 7 Bindus fortunes and
happiness; 6 Bindus acquisition of robes, conveyances, gold etc.; 5 Bindus destruction of
enemies and success in undertakings; 4 Bindus no loss, no gain; 3 Bindus loss of hearing,
sight and masculine vigour; 2 Bindus incurring royal wrath; 1 Bindu distress due to diseases
and absence of Bindus destruction of relatives, wealth and progeny.
8.EFFECTS OF A.V. OF VENUS.
The association of Venus with various number of Bindus will generate the under mentioned
effects: 8 Bindus enjoyments of all kinds and acquisition of robes, wife, scents, food, drinks
etc.
